en_title: Rising AI demand lifts Cisco to another earnings and revenue beat
en_bullets: Cisco reported $5.3 billion in AI infrastructure orders from hyperscalers so far this year.
Cisco raised its full-year AI order forecast to $9 billion, up from $5 billion initially.
Cisco will cut fewer than 4,000 jobs, incurring pre-tax charges of about $1 billion.
Cisco acquired Astrix Security for nearly $300 million to boost 'agentic' security offerings.
Networking segment revenue jumped 25% to $8.82 billion, surpassing forecasts.
zh_title: 人工智慧需求攀升 推動思科再創盈收佳績
zh_bullets: 思科今年迄今已收到來自超大規模雲端服務商的53億美元人工智慧基礎設施訂單。
思科將全年人工智慧訂單預測從最初的50億美元上調至90億美元。
思科將裁減少於4,000個職位，將產生約10億美元的稅前費用。
思科以近3億美元收購Astrix Security，以強化其「代理式」安全產品。
網路部門營收跳增25%，達88.2億美元，超出預期。

en_title: OpenAI Acquires A Startup Famous For AI Celebrity Voice Clones
en_bullets: OpenAI has acquired Weights.gg, a voice cloning startup, along with its intellectual property and team.
Weights.gg shut down on April 1, 2026, before the acquisition was revealed by The New York Times.
OpenAI does not plan to relaunch Weights.gg, but has integrated its staff into internal teams.
OpenAI will likely restrict advanced voice replication tools to trusted partners, not for public release.
zh_title: OpenAI 收購以 AI 名人聲音克隆聞名的新創公司
zh_bullets: OpenAI 已收購聲音克隆新創公司 Weights.gg 及其智慧財產權和團隊。
Weights.gg 於 2026 年 4 月 1 日關閉，收購消息由《紐約時報》披露前。
OpenAI 不計劃重新啟動 Weights.gg，但已將其員工整合至內部團隊。
OpenAI 可能會將先進的聲音複製工具限制於可信賴的合作夥伴，不會公開發布。

en_title: LumApps Launches the AI Employee Hub to Accelerate AI Adoption
en_bullets: LumApps has launched LumApps AI, an Employee Hub with AI agents for daily business tasks.
Most AI agents will be available in self-service mode and can be customized for specific workflows.
A new Forward-Deployment Engineering team assists customers in creating bespoke AI agents end-to-end.
LumApps AI aims to bridge the adoption gap by targeting both frontline and desk-based employees.
Only 18% of companies have AI integrated in workflows, despite growing global AI investments.
zh_title: LumApps 推出 AI 員工中心，加速 AI 採用
zh_bullets: LumApps 推出 LumApps AI，這是一個配備 AI 代理人的員工中心，用於日常業務任務。
大多數 AI 代理人將以自助服務模式提供，並可針對特定工作流程進行客製化。
全新前置部署工程團隊協助客戶端到端打造專屬 AI 代理人。
LumApps AI 旨在縮短採用落差，目標涵蓋前線及辦公桌員工。
儘管全球 AI 投資持續成長，僅有 18% 企業將 AI 整合至工作流程中。

en_title: Adani Enterprises And Jabil Target A Strategic Alliance To Build AI Data Center Infrastructure Platform In India
en_bullets: Adani Group and Jabil plan to build an integrated AI and data center hardware manufacturing platform in India.
The platform aims to deploy multi-gigawatt high-density AI rack production using advanced SMT and liquid cooling.
This alliance targets a global market opportunity exceeding $3 trillion over the next seven years.
India's Union Budget 2026 offers a tax holiday for data centers until 2047, boosting export competitiveness.
Jabil brings recently acquired precision thermal and power management technology from Hanley Energy and Mikros Technologies.
zh_title: Adani Enterprises 與 Jabil 目標建立印度 AI 數據中心基礎設施平台的策略聯盟
zh_bullets: Adani 集團與 Jabil 計劃在印度建立一個整合的 AI 與數據中心硬體製造平台。
該平台旨在利用先進的 SMT 和液冷技術，部署多千瓦高密度 AI 機架生產。
此聯盟目標在未來七年內，全球市場機會超過 3 兆美元。
印度 2026 年聯邦預算提供數據中心至 2047 年的免稅優惠，提升出口競爭力。
Jabil 引進近期收購自 Hanley Energy 與 Mikros Technologies 的精密熱管理與電源管理技術。

en_title: Micron Got A New $950 Price Tag: BofA Raises 4 Other AI Chip Stocks
en_bullets: Bank of America nearly doubled its Micron price target to $950 citing structural supply constraints.
BofA increased its 2030 AI data center systems market forecast to $1.7 trillion, up from $1.4 trillion in February.
Micron's new supply from its Idaho and Singapore facilities will not meaningfully impact the market before 2028.
Anthropic's annualized revenue run rate hit $30 billion in April, more than triple December's figure.
Aggregate cloud capex is projected to reach 95%-100% of cash flow in 2026-2028, far above historical norms.
zh_title: 美銀調升美光新目標價至950美元，另調高4檔AI晶片股
zh_bullets: 美銀因結構性供應限制，將美光目標價幾乎翻倍調升至950美元。
美銀將2030年AI資料中心系統市場預測從2月的1.4兆美元調升至1.7兆美元。
美光位於愛達荷與新加坡的新產能在2028年前不會對市場產生顯著影響。
Anthropic年化營收在4月達到300億美元，是去年12月數字的三倍以上。
預計2026至2028年間，整體雲端資本支出將達現金流的95%至100%，遠高於歷史水準。

en_title: Rubin: The invisible revolution reshaping AI winners
en_bullets: Nvidia's Rubin architecture makes PCB material quality critical for AI system performance.
Extreme Low Loss (ELL) materials are now essential for signal integrity in advanced AI infrastructures.
Rubin Ultra and future platforms will require even higher-performance materials for backplanes and network cards.
Taiwan Union Technology, ITEQ, and Elite Material are key suppliers of high-end PCB materials for AI servers.
zh_title: 魯賓：一個看不見的變革，正在重塑人工智慧領域的領先者
zh_bullets: Nvidia 的 Rubin 晶片架構，對 AI 系統的效能至關重要，因此 PCB 材料的品質至關重要。
極低損耗 (ELL) 材料現在在先進的人工智慧基礎設施中，對於訊號完整性至關重要。
Rubin Ultra 及未來的平臺，將需要更高效能的材料來製造主機板和網路卡。
臺灣聯成科技、ITEQ 和 Elite Material 都是 AI 伺服器的關鍵高階 PCB 材料供應商。

en_title: Intel hires former SK hynix chief Lee Seok
en_bullets: Intel appointed ex-SK hynix and SK On CEO Lee Seok-hee as senior VP of its foundry business.
Lee will lead advanced packaging, system integration, and back-end manufacturing at Intel Foundry.
Intel is establishing advanced packaging as a focused business with dedicated leadership under Lee.
Intel will ramp advanced packaging technologies EMIB-T and HBI to high volume under Lee's leadership.
Naga Chandrasekaran will focus on 18A and 14A nodes, reporting to CEO Lip-Bu Tan.
zh_title: 英特爾聘任前SK海力士李錫熙
zh_bullets: 英特爾任命前SK海力士及SK On執行長李錫熙為晶圓代工業務資深副總裁。
李錫熙將領導英特爾晶圓代工的先進封裝、系統整合及後端製造。
英特爾將先進封裝設立為專注業務，並由李錫熙擔任專責領導。
在李錫熙領導下，英特爾將大規模推動先進封裝技術EMIB-T與HBI。
Naga Chandrasekaran將專注於18A與14A製程節點，並向執行長譚立武報告。

en_title: Huawei Officially Announces Its First AI Glasses with Integrated Camera
en_bullets: Huawei AI Glasses are the company's first eyewear product with a built-in camera.
Real-time simultaneous translation and Xiaoyi AI assistant are confirmed as core features.
The glasses use an aerospace-grade titanium alloy frame weighing about 30 grams.
HarmonyOS enables cross-device collaboration with Huawei phones, tablets, and PCs.
The rumored 1200-megapixel camera specification is unverified and not officially confirmed.
zh_title: 華為正式宣佈推出其首款具有內建相機的AI眼鏡
zh_bullets: 華為的AI眼鏡是該公司首款內建相機的眼鏡產品。
即時雙語翻譯和「小雅」AI助手已確認為核心功能。
這些眼鏡採用航空級鈦合金框架，重量約為 30 克。
HarmonyOS 系統支援與華為手機、平板電腦和電腦之間的跨裝置協作。
關於傳聞中的 1200 畫素相機規格，目前尚未得到證實，也未由官方確認。

en_title: Standard Chartered Said to Arrange $2.2 Billion Tanzania Rail Loan
en_bullets: Standard Chartered arranged a $2.2 billion loan for Tanzania's rail project.
The financing involves export credit agencies and development finance institutions.
The deal will fund the third and fourth segments of the 1,219-kilometer railway.
The official signing is set for April 28 in Dodoma, Tanzania.
zh_title: 標準銀行據稱已促成 22 億美元的坦尚尼亞鐵路貸款
zh_bullets: 標準 chartered 銀行為坦尚尼亞的鐵路專案提供 22 億美元的貸款。
這些融資涉及出口信貸機構和發展金融機構。
這筆資金將用於資助鐵路全長 1,219 公里的第三和第四階段的建設。
官方簽署儀式預計於 4 月 28 日在坦尚尼亞的多朵摩舉行。

en_title: Adobe Rolls Out New AI Features Across the Creative Cloud Suite
en_bullets: Adobe is integrating AI features directly into existing Creative Cloud apps, not launching separate tools.
New AI tools automate tasks like background removal, color matching, and layout adjustments in seconds.
Premiere Pro and After Effects now offer AI-powered speech transcription, edit cleanup, and motion graphics enhancement.
AI-driven automation enables smaller teams or freelancers to handle more complex projects without extra resources.
Adobe's AI features are designed to accelerate, not replace, the creative process for designers.
zh_title: Adobe 在 Creative Cloud 套件中推出全新 AI 功能
zh_bullets: Adobe 將 AI 功能直接整合到現有的 Creative Cloud 應用程式中，而不是推出單獨的工具。
新型人工智慧工具可在幾秒鐘內自動完成背景移除、色彩匹配和佈局調整等任務。
Premiere Pro 和 After Effects 現在提供 AI 驅動的語音轉錄、編輯清理和動態圖形增強功能。
人工智慧驅動的自動化使規模較小的團隊或自由工作者能夠在無需額外資源的情況下處理更複雜的專案。
Adobe 的 AI 功能旨在加速設計師的創作過程，而不是取代創作過程。
